entities.name: SOIL MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing soil properties and health through various agricultural techniques

entities.name: SOIL MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Microscopic organisms inhabiting the soil, including fungi and bacteria

entities.name: VESICULAR ARBUSCULAR MYCORRHIZA
entities.description: A type of symbiotic fungus that associates with plant roots, also known as VAM

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A specific order of soil characterized by high base saturation and leaching

entities.name: SEMIARID INDIA
entities.description: The semiarid regions of India where the soil investigations were conducted

entities.name: ZERO TILLAGE
entities.description: A soil management method where the soil is not disturbed by tillage

entities.name: DEEP TILLAGE
entities.description: A soil management method involving deep plowing of the soil

entities.name: ORGANIC AMENDMENTS
entities.description: The application of organic materials to the soil to improve its properties

entities.name: INORGANIC AMENDMENTS
entities.description: The application of inorganic materials or chemical fertilizers to the soil

entities.name: MICROBIAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of microorganisms present in a given volume of soil

entities.name: ENZYME ACTIVITY
entities.description: The rate of chemical reactions catalyzed by enzymes within the soil

entities.name: EARTHWORMS
entities.description: Segmented worms that live in the soil and contribute to its structure and health
